enumValues.name: F3 - Factura emitida en sustitución de simplificadas
R5 - Factura Rectificativa en facturas simplificadas
Factura rectificativa: artículo 80 Cuatro de la Ley del IVA.
Factura rectificativa: artículo 80 Tres de la Ley del IVA.
Factura rectificativa: error fundado en derecho

fields.name: aeatsiiClaveTipo
fields.label: Invoice type key
fields.defaultValue: @SQL=SELECT CASE WHEN ((SELECT c.insiisystem FROM aeatsii_config c WHERE c.ad_org_id = (SELECT ad_get_org_le_bu(@AD_Org_ID@,'LE') FROM dual))='Y') THEN 'F1' ELSE null END FROM dual

fields.name: aeatsiiDescription
fields.label: SII description master
fields.defaultValue:
@SQL=
	SELECT
		CASE
			WHEN
				(
					(
						SELECT c.insiisystem
						FROM aeatsii_config c
						WHERE c.ad_org_id = (
							SELECT ad_get_org_le_bu(@AD_Org_ID@,'LE')
							FROM dual
						)
					)='Y'
				)
			THEN
				(
					SELECT
						(
							CASE
								WHEN ('Y' = 'Y')
								THEN (
									SELECT aeatsii_description_id
									FROM aeatsii_description
									WHERE isdefault = 'Y'
									AND issales = 'Y'
									AND ad_org_id = @AD_Org_ID@
									AND ad_client_id = @ad_client_id@
								) ELSE (null)
							END
						)
					FROM dual
				)
			ELSE null
		END
	FROM dual

fields.name: aeatsiiDescripcionSii
fields.label: SII Description
fields.defaultValue:
@SQL=
	SELECT
		CASE
			WHEN
				(
					(
						SELECT c.insiisystem
						FROM aeatsii_config c
						WHERE c.ad_org_id = (
							SELECT ad_get_org_le_bu(@AD_Org_ID@,'LE')
							FROM dual
						)
					)='Y'
				)
			THEN
				(
					SELECT
						(
							CASE
								WHEN(@issotrx@ = 'Y')
								THEN (
									SELECT description
									FROM aeatsii_description
									WHERE isdefault = 'Y'
									AND issales = 'Y'
									AND ad_org_id = @AD_Org_ID@
									AND ad_client_id = @ad_client_id@
								) ELSE (
									SELECT description
									FROM aeatsii_description
									WHERE isdefault = 'Y'
									AND ispurchase = 'Y'
									AND ad_org_id = @AD_Org_ID@
									AND ad_client_id = @ad_client_id@
								)
							END
						)
					FROM dual
				)
			ELSE null
		END
	FROM dual

fields.name: aeatsiiEstado
fields.label: SII Registration Status
fields.defaultValue: @SQL=SELECT CASE WHEN ((SELECT c.insiisystem FROM aeatsii_config c WHERE c.ad_org_id = (SELECT ad_get_org_le_bu(@AD_Org_ID@,'LE') FROM dual))='Y') THEN 'PE' ELSE null END FROM dual

enumValues.name: Entrega para venta a la vista o de prueba

Operaciones tras el trabajo por encargo
Otras entregas de ayuda (particulares, orgs. no gubernamenta

Comunitarias devueltas al mismo estado expedidas

Temporales para ser reexpedidas a un Estado miembro
